# CybitSolutions

> CybitSolutions is a Veteran-Owned, Minority-Owned IT firm delivering mission-grade cybersecurity, cloud, AI, and digital transformation solutions for government agencies and enterprise organizations.

## Company Overview
- Full Name: CybitSolutions
- Type: Veteran-Owned Small Business (VOSB), Minority-Owned
- Location: Washington D.C. Metropolitan Area
- Experience: 20+ years in government and commercial IT contracting
- Website: https://www.cybitsolutions.com
- Contact: info@cybitsolutions.net | + (771) 233-1379

## Services
- Cybersecurity & Risk Management
- Cloud Computing & Virtualization
- Core IT Infrastructure, Networking & Operations
- Software Development & DevOps
- Data & Analytics
- AI & Automation
- Enterprise IT Services & Platforms
- Digital Transformation & Government IT
- Emerging & Next-Gen Technologies
- Industry-Specific IT Solutions

## Certifications & Contract Vehicles
- GSA Schedule / MAS
- 8(a) Business Development Program Eligible
- CMMC Level 2+ Ready
- ISO 27001 Aligned
- FedRAMP Advisory Services
- ITAR/EAR Compliant Operations

## Key Differentiators
- 100% U.S.-based cleared workforce
- Full lifecycle IT support (design, build, secure, operate)
- Multi-domain expertise across DoD, civilian, and intelligence
- NAICS Codes: 541512, 541511, 541513, 541519, 518210

## Past Performance
- Microsoft 365 & Azure Enterprise Ecosystem
- DoD C3BM / ABMS Program
- State Department Global IT Operations
- Intelligence Community Cyber Defense
- Federal Civilian Agency Cloud Migration
- VA Health IT Modernization
